# i3dnet_flexvm_node (Data Source)

Get information about a single node within an i3D.net FlexVM Cloud, by Cloud UUID and node UUID.

An error is raised if no node exists for the provided ids.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a single node within a FlexVM Cloud by its Cloud and node UUID.
data "i3dnet_flexvm_node" "example" {
  cloud_id = "019256ab-1554-73a7-b091-f024b0a724ea"
  id       = "019256ab-1554-73a7-b091-f024b0a724eb"
}

output "node_serial" {
  value = data.i3dnet_flexvm_node.example.serial
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cloud_id` (String) UUID of the Cloud the node belongs to.
- `id` (String) Cloud Node UUID.

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) Cloud Node name.
- `serial` (String) Cloud Node serial number.
- `status` (String) The status of the Node. One of: `created`, `requested`, `bootstrapping`, `running`, `failed`, `deleting`, `deleted`.
